song.title: A Mind At Perfect Peace with God
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) A mind at perfect peace with God; “O what a word is this!” A sinner reconciled through blood; This, this indeed is peace!
[V2] 2 By nature and by practice far, How very far from God! Yet now by grace brought nigh to Him, Through faith in Jesus’ blood.
[V3] 3) So nigh, so very nigh to God, I cannot nearer be; For in the person of His Son, I am as near as He.
[V4] 4) So dear, so very dear to God, More dear I cannot be; The love wherewith He loves the Son, Such is His love to me.
[V5] 5) Why should I ever anxious be, Since such a God is mine? He watches o’er me night and day, And tells me “Mine is thine."
song.author: Catesby Paget
